mapper.select: SELECT intResIdx, module_srl, member_srl, strResName, strResID , strResType, strModelID, strGroupID, strGroupID1, strGroupID2 , strGroupID3, strGroupID4, strGroupID5, strGroupID6, strGroupID7 , strGroupID8, strGroupID9, strGroupID10, strTags, strPriority , strResMemo, strColID, strIPVer, strIPAddr, strIPv6Addr , strSNMPIPAddr, strSNMPVer, strSNMPCommunity, intSNMPPort, intSNMPTimeout , strSNMPv3_Username, strSNMPv3_SecurityLevel, strSNMPv3_AuthenticationProtocol, strSNMPv3_AuthenticationPassword, strSNMPv3_PrivacyProtocol , strSNMPv3_PrivacyPassword, strSNMPv3_ContextName, strEnabled_CPU, strEnabled_MEM, strEnabled_DISK , strSNMPMIB_CPU, strSNMPMIB_MEM, strSNMPMIB_DISK, strEvent_CPU, strEvent_MEM , strEvent_DISK, strStatusSNMP, strEnabledSNMP, dateUptime, strStatusPing , intIntervalPing, intTimeoutPing, strEnabledPing, intLogRaiseCount, intErrRaiseCount , strCPUCurrent, strMEMCurrent, strDiskCurrent, strRTTCurrent, intSensorPID , strAlive, strContacts, dateProbeUpdateDate, dateLastUpdateDate, dateRegDate FROM catchview.xe_cvnms_resource

SELECT intIfIdx, module_srl, strResID, strIfID, strIfName , strResID_A, strResID_Z, intIfindex, strIfDesc, strIfType , strIfSpeed, strIfPhysAddress, strIfOperStatus, strIfLimitBPS, strIfLimitBPSC , strIfLimitBPSM, strIfLimitBPSN, strIfLimitBPSW, strifErrLevel, strifIPAddr , strifManPerf, strifManError, strIfCurrent, strifLimitErr, strIfMemo , dateLastUpdateDate, dateRegDate FROM catchview.xe_cvnms_resource_if
